title: Communauté d'agglomération Privas Centre Ardèche
summary: Communauté d'agglomération Privas Centre Ardèche is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the town of Privas. It is located in the Ardèche department, in the Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes region, southern France. Created in 2017, its seat is in Privas. Its area is 602.1 km2. Its population was 43,792 in 2019, of which 8,465 in Privas proper.
text:
Communauté d'agglomération Privas Centre Ardèche is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the town of Privas. It is located in the Ardèche department, in the Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes region, southern France. Created in 2017, its seat is in Privas. Its area is 602.1 km2. Its population was 43,792 in 2019, of which 8,465 in Privas proper.

Composition
The communauté d'agglomération consists of the following 42 communes:
